economic_notes: Two government business enterprises accounted for by modified equity method: Construction Equipment Co. (Sault) Inc. (50% owned) and 2104298 Ontario Inc. (50% owned). Western Boundary Settlement funds held in reserve ($8,326,342). Youth trust accounts established for members under 18 at time of per capita distribution from Western Boundary Settlement.
notes: Audit opinion is QUALIFIED due to inability to observe gravel inventory counts at March 31, 2020 and March 31, 2021, with possible effects carrying into 2022. Two GBEs accounted for by modified equity method (Construction Equipment Co. (Sault) Inc. and 2104298 Ontario Inc.), each 50% owned. current_liabilities calculated as accounts payable ($7,052,153) + due to ISC ($159,682) + due to Province ($649,806) = $7,861,641. total_government_transfers includes ISC ($18,991,792) + Canada ($519,844) + Ontario ($3,658,978) = $23,170,614. osr calculated as total revenue before GBE surplus ($39,692,047) minus total_government_transfers ($23,170,614) = $16,521,433. No schedule of remuneration included in the financial statements. Fiscal year is 2022, not 2024 as template default suggests.
